ModMetaData.name: Android Tiers Continued
ModMetaData.author: Atlas, aRandomKiwi, Maicon Neri
ModMetaData.description:
- Adds 4 tiers of androids, including an android dog - 2 new android factions - Allows remote control of surrogate androids - Allows digitizing and storing colonists' minds in supercomputers - Android-specific diseases - Tons of replaceable upgrades / downgrades for androids - Fully customizable - And more
RimWorld Version <color=#FFD800>1.6</color> Mod Version <color=#FFD800>6.0.0-preview</color>
Original work by <color=#FFD800>Atlas and aRandomKiwi</color> Reworked and ported by <color=#FFD800>Maicon Neri</color>
